meta.discount_formula: dealer_cost = SRP × 0.50 (50% off list — trade pricing)
product_lines: Roman Shades (101-Pacifica flat fold, 104-Laguna soft fold)
meta.contact: Fabritec LLC, 7531 Coldwater Canyon Ave, North Hollywood, CA 91605 | 818-503-8300
notes: All prices are Suggested Retail; our dealer cost = price × 0.50
Roman shade prices are for unlined shades unless specified
Standard lifting system for Roman shades: Cord & Cleat (no extra charge)
Standard lifting system for Roller shades: SL-System Skyline Clutch (included in price)

lining_pricing.note: Add lining price to roman shade base price. For roller shades, lining is built into shade price.

cord_and_cleat.note: Standard — included in all roman shade prices

cordless.note: Call sales service before selling — may not work in all situations

slide_winder_operator.note: Especially useful for long narrow shades

bottom_up_roller.note: Add to shade price for bottom-up roller; add motor price if motorized. Max size 80"x80"

motorization_rollease.note: All-inclusive MOTOR ASSEMBLY price — includes motor, battery pack, batteries, and necessary components. Remote controllers and chargers are additional.

0_7nm_battery.note: Price does NOT include recharger or remote

1_1nm_battery.note: Includes battery pack and batteries. Remote additional.

2_0nm_battery.note: Includes battery pack and batteries. Remote additional.

0_7nm_battery.note: Price does NOT include recharger or remote

motorization_somfy.note: Motor assembly pricing. Remote controllers and accessories are additional.

cassettes_and_fascias.note: For roller shades — pricing per linear foot unless noted

multiple_shades_one_headrail.note: 1/4" gap between shades; cords can be routed to one end (Remote Cords) at no extra charge
